{{Quote|I think it's time for a long vacation. I understand the swamps of Borga are almost habitable this time of year.|Tig Fromm comtemplates going into hiding on Borga|<ref name="The White Witch" />}}
'''Borga''' was a terrestrial astronomical object that featured [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]<ref name="The White Witch" /> and was located in the [[Borga system/Legends|Borga system]], a part of the [[Yminis sector/Legends|Yminis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> In [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="date">{{PolyhedronCite|170|Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO}} establishes that the animated series ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'' takes place fifteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] leader [[Tig Fromm]] thought about vacationing on Borga after a plan of his failed, speculating that its swamps were nearly habitable during that [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="The White Witch" />

==Behind the scenes==
Borga was mentioned in "[[The White Witch|The ''White Witch'']],"<ref name="The White Witch" /> the first episode of the animated television series [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']], which was written by [[Peter Sauder]] and premiered on [[September 7]], [[1985]].<ref name="Insider27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Borga [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Borga, in grid square S-14.<ref name="EAOC" />
